completeness_gate.description: All items must pass before handing spec to analyze agent

items.check: Summary is one paragraph, no implementation detail
Every user story has at least one Given/When/Then scenario
P1 stories are independently releasable without P2/P3
Every non-goal from FEATURE.md appears as a MUST NOT requirement
Every FR is a single testable assertion
Minimum AC set covered: auth, empty state, ownership, layout
Edge cases include zero-state and ownership boundary
Constitutional compliance section present with no FAIL items
No file paths, framework names, or library calls anywhere in spec

minimum_ac_set.description: Authenticated user with data gets correct response
Empty state returns 200 with empty collection, not error
Request for another user's data returns 404 (not 403)
Handheld layout renders correctly (single column, tap targets)
Desktop layout renders within AppShell with sidebar
Backend failure shows structured error state with retry

priority_rules.P1: Must ship for feature to have value. Independently releasable as MVP.
priority_rules.P2: Significant value add. Ships after P1 is stable.
priority_rules.P3: Nice to have. Deprioritised if time is constrained.

failure_modes.description: Acceptance criteria too vague to test
failure_modes.signal: AC contains words like 'correctly', 'appropriately', 'as expected', 'should work'

failure_modes.description: Spec describes happy path only, no error or ownership cases
failure_modes.signal: No 401, 404, or empty state ACs present

failure_modes.description: Non-goal stated in intent but not converted to MUST NOT requirement
failure_modes.signal: FEATURE.md has items in 'What This Is NOT' that don't appear in requirements

failure_modes.description: Spec describes client-side inference, athleteId at boundary, or custom nav shell

failure_modes.signal: FR uses vague terms without a defined threshold or condition
